positive: Minimalist cosmic forest scene. Abstract, stylized flora glowing with bioluminescent azure and emerald green light, emerging from deep, velvety black void. The composition features symmetrically placed silhouettes of exotic plants and stylized celestial bodies (like moons and nebulas) rendered in a sophisticated line-art, woodcut etching style. Central focus is a majestic, stylized crescent moon partially obscured by glowing foliage. High contrast, deep blacks against ethereal, glowing colors. Perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Vector art, flat colors, strong outlines, elegant symmetry, maximum detail, clean design.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, low detail, artifacts, noisy, multiple subjects, random elements, bad anatomy, logo, writing, gradient, photo, realistic, 3d render
